requirement_topic.en: Sustainable Energy Authority (SEA) Net-Metering Policy and Approved Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 可持续能源局（SEA）净计量政策与认可设备
requirement_topic.zht: 可持續能源局（SEA）淨計量政策與認可設備

summary.en: Bahrain's Sustainable Energy Authority (SEA), formerly referred to as the Sustainable Energy Unit (SEU), provides support and guidance for net-metering applicants and coordinates the national renewable energy policy framework. The Net Metering Policy was approved by Cabinet Resolution No. 2 of 2017. SEA supports parties interested in net-metering and provides guidance on the EWA-administered application process. Only EWA-listed approved equipment, including inverters meeting EWA technical requirements, may be used in net-metering installations. Installers must be EWA-certified contractors. All applications are handled via the Benayat platform.
summary.zh: 巴林可持续能源局（SEA，前称可持续能源单位SEU）为净计量申请方提供支持和指导，并协调国家可再生能源政策框架。净计量政策已于2017年获内阁第2号决议批准。SEA为有意参与净计量的各方提供支持，并就EWA管理的申请流程提供指导。净计量装置中只能使用EWA认可的设备（包括满足EWA技术要求的逆变器）。安装商须为EWA认证承包商。所有申请通过Benayat平台处理。
summary.zht: 巴林可持續能源局（SEA，前稱可持續能源單位SEU）為淨計量申請方提供支持和指導，並協調國家可再生能源政策框架。淨計量政策已於2017年獲內閣第2號決議批准。SEA為有意參與淨計量的各方提供支持，並就EWA管理的申請流程提供指導。淨計量裝置中只能使用EWA認可的設備（包括滿足EWA技術要求的逆變器）。安裝商須為EWA認證承包商。所有申請通過Benayat平台處理。

standards_or_laws: Cabinet Resolution No. 2 of 2017 (Bahrain Net Metering Policy)
EWA approved contractor and consultant requirements

summary.en: China's distributed PV net-metering is administered by provincial grid companies under national policy frameworks including the Renewable Energy Law and related NEA regulations. Chinese domestic net-metering procedures and equipment approvals are not recognised in Bahrain's SEA / EWA framework.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏净计量由省级电网公司根据包括《可再生能源法》和相关国家能源局法规在内的国家政策框架进行管理。中国国内净计量程序和设备批准不被巴林SEA / EWA框架认可。
summary.zht: 中國分布式光伏淨計量由省級電網公司根據包括《可再生能源法》和相關國家能源局法規在內的國家政策框架進行管理。中國國內淨計量程序和設備批准不被巴林SEA / EWA框架認可。

gap.en: Chinese-market inverters have no standing in Bahrain's SEA / EWA net-metering framework. Exporters must obtain EWA material-approval for the specific inverter model, use EWA-certified contractors, and apply through the Benayat platform. Engage an EWA-approved consultant early in the project to confirm equipment eligibility.
gap.zh: 中国市场逆变器在巴林SEA / EWA净计量框架下无既定地位。出口商须为特定逆变器型号取得EWA物料认可，使用EWA认证承包商，并通过Benayat平台提出申请。在项目早期聘用EWA认可顾问，确认设备资质。
gap.zht: 中國市場逆變器在巴林SEA / EWA淨計量框架下無既定地位。出口商須為特定逆變器型號取得EWA物料認可，使用EWA認證承包商，並通過Benayat平台提出申請。在項目早期聘用EWA認可顧問，確認設備資質。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for net-metering installations; EWA material-approval and certified contractor requirements are operative conditions for grid connection under the 2017 Net Metering Policy
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic distributed PV grid connection under NEA regulations; procedures and approvals differ entirely from Bahrain

source.publisher: Sustainable Energy Authority (SEA), Kingdom of Bahrain

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain's net-metering framework requires EWA material-approval for inverters and EWA-certified contractors. China domestic net-metering credentials have no standing in Bahrain. Apply through the Benayat platform with an EWA-approved consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林净计量框架要求逆变器取得EWA物料认可并使用EWA认证承包商。中国国内净计量资质在巴林不具效力。通过Benayat平台与EWA认可顾问合作提出申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林淨計量框架要求逆變器取得EWA物料認可並使用EWA認證承包商。中國國內淨計量資質在巴林不具效力。通過Benayat平台與EWA認可顧問合作提出申請。
